sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107340" key="u(perblasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερβλαστ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n107340.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shooting over-luxuriantly,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
